ordinary_tax_substeps.line_22: Use the TY2025 tax table when rounded line 5 is below $100,000, otherwise use the TY2025 tax computation worksheet.
ordinary_tax_substeps.line_24: Use the TY2025 tax table when rounded line 1 is below $100,000, otherwise use the TY2025 tax computation worksheet.

trigger_rules: Use this worksheet when qualified dividends are present and the Schedule D Tax Worksheet is not required.
Use this worksheet when Schedule D is not required and Form 1040 line 7 is only direct capital gain distributions.
Use this worksheet when Schedule D is present and both Schedule D lines 15 and 16 are gains.
worksheet_name: Qualified Dividends and Capital Gain Tax Worksheet
